## Verses (29)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Then Zophar the Naamathite made answer and said, | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | For this cause my thoughts are troubling me and driving me on. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | I have to give ear to arguments which put me to shame, and your answers to me are wind without wisdom. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Have you knowledge of this from early times, when man was placed on the earth, | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | That the pride of the sinner is short, and the joy of the evil-doer but for a minute? | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Though he is lifted up to the heavens, and his head goes up to the clouds; | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Like the waste from his body he comes to an end for ever: those who have seen him say, Where is he? | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | He is gone like a dream, and is not seen again; he goes in flight like a vision of the night. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | The eye which saw him sees him no longer; and his place has no more knowledge of him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | His children are hoping that the poor will be kind to them, and his hands give back his wealth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | His bones are full of young strength, but it will go down with him into the dust. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Though evil-doing is sweet in his mouth, and he keeps it secretly under his tongue; | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Though he takes care of it, and does not let it go, but keeps it still in his mouth; | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | His food becomes bitter in his stomach; the poison of snakes is inside him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | He takes down wealth as food, and sends it up again; it is forced out of his stomach by God. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | He takes the poison of snakes into his mouth, the tongue of the snake is the cause of his death. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | Let him not see the rivers of oil, the streams of honey and milk. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | He is forced to give back the fruit of his work, and may not take it for food; he has no joy in the profit of his trading. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Because he has been cruel to the poor, turning away from them in their trouble; because he has taken a house by force which he did not put up; | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | There is no peace for him in his wealth, and no salvation for him in those things in which he took delight. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | He had never enough for his desire; for this cause his well-being will quickly come to an end. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | Even when his wealth is great, he is full of care, for the hand of everyone who is in trouble is turned against him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | God gives him his desire, and sends the heat of his wrath on him, making it come down on him like rain. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | He may go in flight from the iron spear, but the arrow from the bow of brass will go through him; | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | He is pulling it out, and it comes out of his back; and its shining point comes out of his side; he is overcome by fears. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | All his wealth is stored up for the dark: a fire not made by man sends destruction on him, and on everything in his tent. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | The heavens make clear his sin, and the earth gives witness against him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | The produce of his house is taken away into another country, like things given into the hands of others in the day of wrath. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | This is the reward of the evil man, and the heritage given to him by God. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
